rawInstruction: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the next sc from 3 rows below (see reference image), then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
summary: Work single crochets and front post double crochets into the row below, repeating across.
title: Row 5
